summarizedActivitiesExport.name: Strength
summarizedActivitiesExport.description:
Warmup: Row machine 5 minutes (1163 meters). 

After the first set of deadlifts, my lower back started to hurt so instead of doing another set I did single leg deadlift with lighter weight. It may have gotten injured during squats yesterday because I felt a little pain, then deadlifts today put it over the edge.
